creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
Looking at the difference in boot1.efi there's an extra instruction in the cross-built case

--- i386-on-amd64/boot/boot1.efi
+++ i386-on-i386/boot/boot1.efi
â”śâ”€â”€ objdump
â”‚ @@ -55,15 +55,15 @@
â”‚  Entry d 0000000000000000 00000000 Delay Import Directory
â”‚  Entry e 0000000000000000 00000000 CLR Runtime Header
â”‚  Entry f 0000000000000000 00000000 Reserved
â”‚
â”‚
â”‚  Sections:
â”‚  Idx Name          Size     VMA      Type
â”‚ -  0 .text         000121ba 00001000 TEXT
â”‚ +  0 .text         000121b6 00001000 TEXT
â”‚    1 .data         0000a538 00014000 DATA
â”‚    2 .sdata        00000024 0001f000 DATA
...
â”‚ -    221c:            movl    %edi, 0x28(%esp)
â”‚ -    2220:            movl    %eax, (%esp)
â”‚ -    2223:            movl    %ecx, 0x4(%esp)
â”‚ -    2227:            je      0x2252 <.text+0x1252>
â”‚ -    2229:            movl    -0x1ec4(%ebx), %ecx
...
â”‚ +    221c:            movl    %eax, (%esp)
â”‚ +    221f:            movl    %ecx, 0x4(%esp)
â”‚ +    2223:            je      0x224e <.text+0x124e>
â”‚ +    2225:            movl    -0x1ec4(%ebx), %ecx
